applications.description: Application definitions owned by the project.

entity_meta.description: References into the entity-management model (opaque identifiers).

ApplicationDef.description: An application definition: composed UI + modules + plugins.

components.description: A2UI components composing this application (forge registry refs).

modules.description: Application modules (logical grouping; opaque metadata this phase).

plugins.description: WASM component/plugin references (resolved by the Kiln runtime).

ApplicationId.description: Identifies an application definition within a project.

ComponentRef.description: A reference to an A2UI component held in the forge registry.

version.description: Pinned registry version of the component.

EntityMetaRef.description:
An opaque reference into the `prometheus-entity-management` model.

That project is a TypeScript workspace, not a Rust crate, so this carries
only an identifier — no Rust dependency on it.

ModuleRef.description: A reference to an application module.

metadata.description: Free-form module metadata (typed per module kind in a later phase).

PluginRef.description: A reference to a WASM component/plugin.

locator.description: Locator for the component (OCI/IPFS/registry — resolved by Kiln).

ProjectId.description: Identifies a project (the hub artifact administered by this agent).

RealtimeParams.description: Realtime parameters for a project (subscription/CDC configuration).

config.description: Opaque realtime configuration (channels, CDC tables) — typed later.

enabled.description: Whether realtime sync is enabled for the project.

RegistryComponentId.description:
Identifier of a component in forge's A2UI registry.

Placeholder newtype to be resolved against `RFC-FORGE-A2UI-001` when the
forge registry is available; the shape (id + version) is intentionally stable.

SchemaDef.description: A database/table schema definition, with A2UI generation hints.

ui_hints.description:
A2UI generation hints (field types, display formats, component hints).

Opaque `Value` here — the concrete hint vocabulary is owned by forge's
`flint_meta` / `RFC-FORGE-A2UI-001`; this carries it without re-defining it.

SubAgentDef.description: A sub-agent belonging to a project (a downstream agent the project defines).

config.description: Opaque configuration (model routing, tools, etc.) — typed in a later phase.

role.description: The agent's role/purpose within the project.

SubAgentId.description: Identifies a sub-agent definition within a project.
